text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process svchost.exe made 15 rapid connections to port 5985 (WinRM) within a single second, which is highly unusual and indicative of potential malicious activity such as a connection flood, C2 communication, or lateral movement attempts. Additionally, it repeatedly created registry entries under HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections, which, while not inherently malicious, combined with the network activity, raises suspicion.",
  "indicators": [
    "WinRM port 5985",
    "rapid connections",
    "repeated network connections",
    "registry modification",
    "Internet Settings"
  ]
}
